message:
fix(vc_store): replace datetime('now') with CURRENT_TIMESTAMP in all migration DEFAULT clauses

SQLite's CURRENT_TIMESTAMP is the idiomatic way to express default
timestamps.  The previous datetime('now') form required parenthesized
expressions in DEFAULT clauses and was inconsistent with how
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP is documented in the DuckDB-to-SQLite translation
table.  This commit normalises all 14 affected migration files
(001-024) and updates the compat reference table in migrations.rs
to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     tags TEXT, -- JSON array: '["tag1","tag2"]', query via json_each(tags)
     metadata_json TEXT,
-    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
-    updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
+    created_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+    updated_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
 );
